LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT BUILD GROUP, INC.'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASES CGC-15-549671, CGC-16-551718, CGC-16-552448, CGC-16-553299 WITH CASE CGC-15-548570 IS GRANTED IN PART. THIS CASE WILL BE CONSOLIDATED WITH CASE 549671 FOR ALL PURPOSES. THERE ARE COMMON ISSUES OF FACT AND LAW IN BOTH CASES AND CONSOLIDATION WILL PROMOTE JUDICIAL ECONOMY. THIS CASE IS THE LEAD CASE AND ALL FUTURE FILINGS ARE IN THIS CASE ONLY. THE TWO INSURANCE COVERAGE CASES (552448 AND 553299) WILL NOT BE CONSOLIDATED WITH THIS CASE BECAUSE THE INSURANCE COVERAGE CASES RAISE DISTINCTLY DIFFERENT FACTUAL AND LEGAL ISSUES AND CONSOLIDATING THEM WITH THIS CASE WOULD LIKELY CAUSE PREJUDICE TO ONE OR MORE OF THE PARTIES IN THIS CASE. IF THE PARTIES TO THE TWO INSURANCE COVERAGE CASES AGREE TO CONSOLIDATION OF THOSE CASES, THEY CAN REFLECT THEIR AGREEMENT IN A STIPULATION AND PROPOSED ORDER AND SUBMIT IT TO THE DEPARTMENT 302 FOR SIGNATURE BY THE COURT. MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-15-549671, CGC-16-551718, CGC-16-552448, CGC-16-553299 WITH CASE CGC-15-548570
Off Calendar Oct-27-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Garrett Dillon of Varela, Lee, Metz & Guarino, LLP telephone number 415-623-7000 for Plaintiff 35 Dolores LLC.
David Harris of Haight, Brown & Bonesteel LLP telephone number 415-546-7500 for Cross-Defendant Build Group, Inc.
Appearances: William Berman of Duane Morris LLP telephone number 415-957-3133 for Defendant Greenwich Insurance Co.
Matthew Peng of Gordon & Rees LLP telephone number 415-986-5900 for Defendant Build Group, Inc.
Charles Fanning of Oliva & Fanning, ALC telephone number 858-385-0491 appeared by telpehone for Plaintiff 35 Dolores LLC.

Mr. Harris presented oral argument. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court confirmed its tentative ruling. Defendant Build Group, Inc.'s motion to consolidate actions of cases CGC-15-549671, CGC-16-551718, CGC-16-552448, CGC-16-553299 with case CGC-15-548570 is granted in part. This case will be consolidated with case 549671 for all purposes. There are common issues of fact and law in both cases and consolidation will promote judicial economy. This case is the lead case and all future filings are in this case only. The two insurance coverage cases (552448 and 553299) will not be consolidated with this case because the insurance coverage cases raise distinctly different factual and legal issues and consolidating them with this case would likely cause prejudice to one or more of the parties in this case. If the parties to the two insurance coverage cases agree to consolidation of those cases, they can reflect their agreement in a stipulation and proposed order and submit it to the department 302 for signature by the court. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-14-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gary Goyette of Goyette & Associates telephone number 916-851-1900 appeared by telephone for Cross-Defendant All Coast Builders.
David Harris of Haight Brown & Bonesteel LLP telephone number 415-546-7500 for Cross-Defendant Build Group, Inc.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court confirmed its tentative ruling. CROSS-DEFENDANT ALL COAST BUILDERS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO to the tenth through sixteenth causes of action in Build Group, Inc.'s cross-complaint is sustained with twenty days leave to amend as to all seven claims. The cross-complaint fails to allege ultimate facts, as opposed to conclusions of law, supporting any of the seven claims alleged against All Coast. Build Group is given leave to amend, if it can do so in good faith, to correct these deficiencies. Order signed in open Court.
